components.name: JumperButton
components.description: Multi-variant button with CVA-powered styles. Supports primary, secondary, ghost, and critical variants.
components.longDescription: The JumperButton is the primary interactive element in the Jumper Design System. It uses class-variance-authority (CVA) for variant management and supports Radix UI Slot for polymorphic rendering. The primary variant uses a subtle slate-700 background that transitions to Jumper Orange on hover, keeping the brand color for interaction rather than resting state.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant. Primary uses slate-700 with orange hover. Critical uses Jumper Orange as resting state for destructive/urgent actions.

props.name: size
props.description: Button size. Default: h-10 px-4. Sm: h-9 px-3. Lg: h-11 px-8. Icon: h-10 w-10 (square).

props.name: asChild
props.description: When true, renders as Radix Slot — merges props into the child element instead of rendering a <button>.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button. Adds opacity-50 and pointer-events-none.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes to merge.

props.name: children
props.description: Button content — text, icons, or both.

variants.label: Primary
variants.classes: bg-slate-700 text-white hover:bg-jumper-orange hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200
variants.description: Default action button. Slate background transitions to Jumper Orange on hover.

variants.label: Secondary
variants.description: Secondary emphasis. Uses the subtle gray accent system.

variants.label: Ghost
variants.description: Transparent with border. For tertiary actions and toolbars.

variants.label: Critical
variants.description: Jumper Orange (#FA4721) as resting state. For high-emphasis actions — the 15% accent color demanding attention.

variants.label: Default
variants.description: Standard button size.

variants.label: Small
variants.description: Compact button for tight spaces.

variants.label: Large
variants.description: Prominent button for hero sections.

variants.label: Icon Only
variants.description: Square button for icon-only actions.

examples.title: With Icon
examples.code:
import { Plus } from 'lucide-react'

<JumperButton>
  <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
  Add Item
</JumperButton>

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Uses semantic <button> element. When asChild, ensure child is focusable.
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus-visible ring (3px primary color, 3px offset). Disabled state removes from tab order.

components.name: JumperCard
components.description: Flexible card container with selected state and subtle hover effects. Compound component pattern.
components.longDescription: The JumperCard uses a compound component pattern with JumperCardHeader, JumperCardTitle, JumperCardDescription, JumperCardContent, and JumperCardFooter subcomponents. Features a CVA-powered selected state with accent border and shadow. All subcomponents use solid bg-card background with subtle hover transitions.
components.importStatement: import { JumperCard, JumperCardHeader, JumperCardTitle, JumperCardDescription, JumperCardContent, JumperCardFooter } from '@/components/ui/jumper-card'

props.name: selected
props.description: Selected state. Adds accent border (2px) and shadow-md.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes.

props.name: children
props.description: Card content — typically composed with JumperCardHeader, JumperCardContent, etc.

variants.label: Default
variants.description: Default card with subtle border and hover effect.

variants.label: Selected
variants.description: Selected card with accent border emphasis.

examples.title: Basic Card
examples.code:
Card Title Card description text

Card content goes here.

examples.title: Selected Card
examples.code:
Active Item

This card is selected.

 Edit

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Use semantic heading levels within JumperCardTitle. The card itself is a generic div.
accessibility.focusManagement: When cards are selectable in a list, use roving tabindex pattern.

components.name: JumperInput
components.description: Accessible form input with integrated label, error state, and validation feedback.
components.longDescription: The JumperInput wraps a native <input> with optional label, error states, and ARIA accessibility. Uses CVA for error/normal state styling. The onChange handler returns a string value directly (not an event). Auto-generates accessible IDs for label-input-error association. Supports all native input types.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input. Automatically linked via htmlFor.

props.name: error
props.description: Error state. Boolean shows error border. String shows error border + error message.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Value change handler. Receives the string value directly, not the event.

props.name: type
props.description: Input type — text, email, password, number, etc.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks field as required. Adds red asterisk to label.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when input is empty.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the input element.

variants.label: Normal
variants.description: Default input state with subtle accent focus ring.

variants.label: Error
variants.description: Error state with red border and light red background tint.

examples.title: With Error
examples.code:
<JumperInput
  label="Password"
  type="password"
  error="Password must be at least 8 characters"
  required
/>

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Label is linked via htmlFor/id. Error messages use role='alert' with aria-live='polite'. Required fields marked with aria-label 'obrigatório'.
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus-visible ring (2px accent-subtle, 2px offset). Error state changes ring to destructive color.

components.name: JumperLoading
components.description: Branded loading indicator with spinning ring around the Jumper X logo. Three size variants.
components.longDescription: The JumperLoading component displays the Jumper X symbol with a pulsing animation surrounded by a spinning ring in the primary color. Includes bouncing dots and a customizable message. Also exports JumperLoadingOverlay (full-screen with backdrop blur) and JumperPageLoading (centered in content area). Automatically selects the correct logo variant (white/black) based on the current theme.

props.name: message
props.description: Loading message displayed below the spinner.

props.name: size
props.description: Spinner size. Sm: 32px. Md: 48px. Lg: 64px.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes.

variants.label: Small
variants.description: Compact loading for inline use.

variants.label: Medium
variants.description: Default loading size.

variants.label: Large
variants.description: Prominent loading for page-level use.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Loading message is announced via aria-live region. The visual spinner is decorative (aria-hidden).
accessibility.focusManagement: Overlay traps focus when visible. Page loading does not affect focus.

components.name: JumperLogo
components.description: Official Jumper Studio logo component with theme-aware asset switching and size variants.
components.longDescription: The JumperLogo renders the official Jumper Studio brand mark. Supports the X symbol (showText=false) or the full logo with wordmark (showText=true). Automatically switches between white and black variants based on the current theme via ThemeContext. Uses CVA for size management and includes error fallbacks to text when images fail to load.

props.name: size
props.description: Logo size. Sm: 24px. Md: 32px. Lg: 40px.

props.name: theme
props.description: Force a specific theme variant. Auto detects from ThemeContext.

props.name: showText
props.description: Show full logo with wordmark (true) or X symbol only (false).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes.

variants.label: Small
variants.description: Compact logo for tight spaces.

variants.label: Medium
variants.description: Default logo size for headers.

variants.label: Large
variants.description: Prominent logo for hero sections.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Images have appropriate alt text. Fallback text renders when images fail to load.
accessibility.focusManagement: Logo is not focusable by default. Wrap in a link to make it interactive.

components.name: JumperBackground
components.description: Full-page background component with brand color variants reflecting the 40/30/15/5/5/5 palette proportion.
components.longDescription: The JumperBackground provides a full-screen background surface using the official Jumper palette. Variants reflect brand proportions: Black (40%) and White (30%) are dominant, Orange (15%) is the star accent, and Purple (5%), Gray (5%), Dark Gray (5%) are supporting. Includes an optional dark overlay (rgba black at 70% opacity) for content contrast. Content renders in a z-10 layer above the overlay.

props.name: variant
props.description: Background variant mapped to brand palette. Black (40%), White (30%), Orange (15%), Gray (5%), Purple (5%), Dark Gray (5%).

props.name: overlay
props.description: Show dark overlay for contrast (70% black).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered above the background and overlay.

variants.label: Black (40%)
variants.description: Dominant — primary dark surface. 40% of brand presence.

variants.label: White (30%)
variants.description: Dominant — primary light surface. 30% of brand presence.

variants.label: Jumper Orange (15%)
variants.description: Primary accent — hero sections, CTAs. 15% of brand presence.

variants.label: Gray (5%)
variants.description: Neutral — subtle sections, dividers. 5% of brand presence.

variants.label: Purple (5%)
variants.description: Minor accent — subtle brand touches. 5% of brand presence. Use sparingly.

variants.label: Dark Gray (5%)
variants.description: Neutral dark — secondary containers. 5% of brand presence.

examples.title: Black Hero (Default)
examples.code: Welcome

examples.title: Orange Hero
examples.code: Jumper Studio

examples.title: White Content Area
examples.code: Clean content area

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Background is purely decorative. Content within is read normally by screen readers.
accessibility.focusManagement: No focus behavior. Content within manages its own focus.
